title: phyllocephalum courtallense
intro: Phyllocephalum courtallense is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, commonly known as the Indian sage or 'Vetiver'. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and providing relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves of Phyllocephalum courtallense are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
